statement: In every magma, Equation 2197 (`x = ((y * z) * z) * (x * z)`) implies Equation 3304 (`x * x = y * (z * (w * u))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0867
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op y z) z) (op x z))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x x) = (op y (op z (op w u)))
